name: IdsMrLnSvcCatRowCntBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A12_TMP_IdsMrLnSvcCatRowCntBal; SELECT SRC.MR_LN_ID AS SRC_MR_LN_ID, SRC.EFF_DT_SK AS SRC_EFF_DT_SK, SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT.MR_LN_ID AS TRGT_MR_LN_ID, TRGT.EFF_DT_SK AS TRGT_EFF_DT_SK, TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A12_TMP_IdsMrLnSvcCatRowCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_MR_LN_SVC_CAT AS SRC FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MR_LN_SVC_CAT AS TRGT ON TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND TRGT.MR_LN_ID = SRC.MR_LN_ID AND TRGT.EFF_DT_SK = SRC.EFF_DT_SK WHERE TRGT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle}; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A12_TMP_IdsMrLnSvcCatRowCntBal_Research; SELECT SRC_MR_LN_ID, SRC_EFF_DT_SK, SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT_MR_LN_ID, TRGT_EFF_DT_SK, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A12_TMP_IdsMrLnSvcCatRowCntBal_Research FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A12_TMP_IdsMrLnSvcCatRowCntBal WHERE SRC_MR_LN_ID IS NULL OR SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR SRC_EFF_DT_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_MR_LN_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_EFF_DT_SK IS NULL; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A12_TMP_IdsMrLnSvcCatRowCntBal_Notify; SELECT 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS MR LN SVC CAT IS OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A12_TMP_IdsMrLnSvcCatRowCntBal_Notify WHERE @{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd} = 'OUT';
